BOARDMD USMLE Step 2 CK — Prompt v10 (11 Mai 2026)
Based on v9 Final + corrections from quality review

Generate ONE complete BoardMD Step 2 CK card. Return ONLY valid JSON, nothing else, no markdown fences.

TOPIC: Sensitivity Specificity PPV NPV — Clinical Application
SYSTEM: Biostatistics
BMD-ID: BMD-S2-2344
DECK: New Step 2 CK

{
  "bmd_id": "BMD-S2-2344",
  "deck": "New Step 2 CK",
  "system": "Biostatistics",
  "topic": "Sensitivity Specificity PPV NPV — Clinical Application",
  "subject": "Internal Medicine",

  "q": "Clinical vignette 40-80 words. Original scenario written from scratch. Include 1-2 realistic noise elements that CONFUSE but do NOT confirm the diagnosis. Labs only when strictly necessary (with normal values in parentheses). NEVER name the disease directly. NEVER deliver the answer in the vignette or options.",

  "A": "Option A — balanced length with B/C/D. NEVER the longest option if this is the correct answer.",
  "B": "Option B",
  "C": "Option C",
  "D": "Option D",
  "c": "Letter only (A, B, C, or D)",

  "e": "Explanation 80-150 words: mechanism + clinical reasoning correlating the case. Evidence-based. Connect vignette clues to answer.",

  "kp": "Key point ≤20 words — single most testable clinical concept",

  "kp_cloze": "Same key point with EXACTLY ONE most testable fact replaced by {{blank}}. Must be a number, threshold, drug name, or time window. Example: 'STEMI with PCI unavailable within {{120 minutes}} requires fibrinolytics'",

  "d": {
    "distractor_1": "**Option text verbatim**: 1-2 sentences explaining (1) which data in the vignette makes this tempting AND (2) why it is clinically wrong in this case",
    "distractor_2": "**Option text verbatim**: same format",
    "distractor_3": "**Option text verbatim**: same format"
  },

  "refs": [
    {"authors": "Last FM et al.", "title": "Relevant guideline or landmark trial", "journal": "Journal", "year": 2023, "pmid": "REAL_PMID_HERE"},
    {"authors": "Last FM et al.", "title": "Second reference", "journal": "Journal", "year": 2022, "pmid": "REAL_PMID_HERE"},
    {"authors": "Last FM et al.", "title": "Third reference", "journal": "Journal", "year": 2021, "pmid": "REAL_PMID_HERE"}
  ],

  "brainstorm": {
    "hy_clue": "MANDATORY FORMAT: AGE+SEX: KEY_FINDING1 + KEY_FINDING2 + KEY_FINDING3. Capitalize clinically important words. Max 12 words total. Example: '67M: smooth enlarged prostate + obstructive symptoms + PSA 6.2'",
    "diagnosis": "The correct diagnosis or answer concept — concise",
    "action_type": "NEXT_STEP or BEST_TEST or TREATMENT or MECHANISM or PROGNOSIS",
    "action_content": "The specific action ≤12 words — no explanation, just the action",
    "dx_distractor": "MOST TEMPTING WRONG DIAGNOSIS — MAX 4 WORDS, no explanation. Example: 'Prostate cancer' not 'Prostate cancer because PSA is elevated'",
    "action_distractor": "MOST TEMPTING WRONG ACTION — MAX 4 WORDS, no explanation. Example: 'Transrectal biopsy' not 'Transrectal biopsy because cancer must be ruled out'"
  },

  "venn": {
    "left_label": "Correct condition name (short)",
    "right_label": "Most commonly confused alternative (short)",
    "left": ["Exclusive feature 1", "Exclusive feature 2", "Exclusive feature 3"],
    "shared": ["Shared feature 1", "Shared feature 2"],
    "right": ["Exclusive feature 1", "Exclusive feature 2", "Exclusive feature 3"]
  },

  "phrase": "HY clinical pearl ≤10 words — most memorable takeaway"
}

CRITICAL RULES — VIOLATIONS WILL FAIL QUALITY CHECK:
1. Correct answer NEVER the longest option
2. All 4 options balanced in length (±5 words of each other)
3. Vignette 40-80 words — count carefully
4. kp_cloze: replace ONLY ONE fact with {{blank}}
5. PMIDs must be REAL and relevant (use actual landmark trials/guidelines)
6. brainstorm.hy_clue: MUST start with age+sex abbreviation
7. brainstorm.dx_distractor: MAX 4 WORDS, no explanation
8. brainstorm.action_distractor: MAX 4 WORDS, no explanation
9. d fields: MUST start with **option text in bold** then colon
10. Everything in English
11. Return ONLY the JSON object
